original_image_tags: A salmon-pink or light orange paper document page, likely the reverse side of a sheet or a file folder divider. The page is blank except for several ink stamps near the bottom center. The paper shows two hole-punches at the top edge. There is a faint, mirrored/bleed-through text impression visible across the page, appearing backwards as if from the other side of the paper.

elements.description: A pinkish piece of paper, likely the back of a document, with two punch holes at the top. Two faded, blue, upside-down ink stamps are visible near the bottom. The clearer stamp reads 'RECEIVED / INTERNAL SECURITY / F.B.I.' and 'RECEIVED ... p 29 3 16 PM'. The second, fainter stamp reads 'RECEIVED / (INTERNAL SECURITY) ... 17 11 02 AM'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text from two stamps ('RECEIVED / INTERNAL SECURITY / F.B.I.' and timestamps) that Description A describes only as faint, mirrored text, directly contradicting the legibility and content of the visual stamps.
